prTitle: feat: configure Nginx WebSocket proxy for real-time game updates
prBody:
## Summary

Configures the Nginx reverse proxy to support WebSocket connections alongside existing REST API routes, enabling real-time game state updates via the `/ws/` path.

### Changes

- **`frontend/nginx.conf`**: Added `map` directive for WebSocket Connection header handling, `/ws/` location block with `Upgrade`/`Connection` headers, `proxy_http_version 1.1`, and 24-hour read/send timeouts for long-lived game sessions
- **`.github/workflows/ci.yml`**: Added `validate-nginx` CI job that runs `nginx -t` via Docker to catch config syntax errors on every push and PR
- **`README.md`**: Updated architecture section to mention Nginx reverse proxy role
- **`docs/nginx-websocket-proxy.md`**: New documentation covering configuration details, directive explanations, request flow diagram, CI validation, and troubleshooting guide

### Acceptance Criteria Met

- [x] Nginx proxies WebSocket connections at `/ws/` path with correct Upgrade and Connection headers
- [x] WebSocket connections remain stable through Nginx with 24-hour timeout settings
- [x] Existing HTTP API routes (`/api/`, `/`, `/static/`) are unaffected by the configuration change

Closes #17
